title: gate_audit stream v1
description: Outreach Sender Gate audit decisions emitted by adapters running in shadow mode (gate evaluated alongside legacy send, no behavior change). Drives the cut-over decision: would the gate have blocked or allowed each historical send?

product.description: Source adapter that emitted this audit event.

lead_hash.description: SHA-256(email)[:N] -- never the raw email. Lets you correlate without storing PII.

lead_business_name.description: Business name for human-readable diff inspection. Optional.

gate_block_label.description: If gate_outcome=block, which gate step + label (e.g. 'network_scrub:business_name:all around town').

gate_step.description: If gate_outcome=block, which of the 9 steps fired (1-9).

legacy_outcome.description: What the legacy Resend / Gmail send path actually did.

agreement.description: match: gate + legacy agree (block-or-allow). would_block_new: gate would have blocked something legacy let through. would_allow_new: gate would have allowed something legacy blocked. both_block_diff_reason: both blocked but for different reasons.

shadow_mode.description: audit_only: gate runs in isolation. shadow_diff: gate + legacy both run, both outcomes recorded. live: gate is the source of truth.
